role: External reference (Marquette 12SL) — OUTSIDE the ensemble, never touches fold 10
eval_protocol: OOF on the native PTB-XL folds 1-8 (NO StratifiedKFold shuffle)
note_threshold: Threshold set at the knee of the PR curve, before precision collapses. Recall 0.667 sits below the 0.749 cardiologist baseline: this is a deliberate choice, since at a threshold giving recall >= 0.70 precision falls to 0.354 (over-calling, not viable). Acceptable for a reference model; the M1-M5 ensemble threshold is chosen separately on its own PR curve.
false_negatives: 19 of 57 missed, 17 of them with probability < 0.10 (missed outright, not near-misses). Profile: narrow QRS (110 vs 137 ms) and low R_PeakTime, i.e. minimal or intermittent pre-excitation, an intrinsic limit of the resting ECG. Cases worth visual inspection: ecg_id 11190 (PR 236 ms) and 17072 (label possibly doubtful).
fold10: NEVER touched — reserved for the final ensemble evaluation
